# /split

> Emit `handoff.v1` per target when an integration spec depends on CE entities, F&O entities, or reporting datasets.

## Usage

```
/split [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--targets <comma-separated>]
```

## Common triggers

- Spec references a CE entity that needs an alternate key or virtual-entity setup → `d365-ce`
- Spec references F&O data entity / DMF flow → `d365-fo`
- Spec references a Power BI dataset / dataflow downstream → `reporting`

## Execution flow

1. Scan spec for cross-agent surface area.
2. Build `handoff.v1` per target; payload includes relevant interface contract + NFR + dependency rationale.
3. Validate against `schemas/handoff.v1.json`.
4. Write `projects/{p}/_handoffs/integration-to-{target}-{feature}.handoff.json`.
5. Mark spec §10 with `<!-- split-emitted: {target} -->`.
6. `currentStates += SPEC_SPLIT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/_handoffs/integration-to-{target}-{feature}.handoff.json`
